admin.description: Tenant administration (49 subcommands, requires Fabric admin role)

list-capacities-tenant-overrides.description: List tenant setting overrides across all capacities

list-capacity-tenant-overrides.description: List overrides for a specific capacity

update-capacity-tenant-override.description: Update a capacity tenant setting override

apache-airflow-job.description: Manage Apache Airflow jobs (environment, files, compute)

app-backend.description: Manage app backends (preview Power Apps backend services)

auth.description: Manage authentication (device code, service principal, WAM broker)

login.description: Log in to Microsoft Fabric via device code flow, browser PKCE, service principal, or WAM broker (Windows SSO)

--browser.description: Use browser-based login with PKCE (opens system browser; provides SSO on macOS with Enterprise SSO Extension)

--certificate.description: Path to PEM or PFX certificate file for service principal authentication

--client-id.description: Application (client) ID of the service principal

--client-secret.description: Client secret for service principal authentication

--federated-token.description: Federated token (OIDC assertion) for workload identity authentication

--federated-token-file.description: Path to file containing the federated token (OIDC assertion)

--scope.description: OAuth2 scope (defaults to Fabric API scope)

--service-principal.description: Authenticate as a service principal (requires --tenant, --client-id, and one credential flag)

--tenant.description: Azure AD tenant ID (defaults to 'common'; required for --service-principal)

--wam.description: Use Windows WAM broker for SSO (Windows only)

logout.description: Log out and clear cached credentials

status.description: Show current authentication status and credential source

azure-databricks-storage.description: Manage Azure Databricks storage items (Fabric integration with Azure Databricks)

list.description: List Azure Databricks storage items in a workspace

show.description: Show details of an Azure Databricks storage item

create.description: Create an Azure Databricks storage item

update.description: Update Azure Databricks storage item properties

delete.description: Delete an Azure Databricks storage item

get-definition.description: Get the definition of an Azure Databricks storage item

update-definition.description: Update the definition (format: AzureDatabricksStorageV1, part: definition.json)

capacity.description: Manage Fabric capacities (list/show via Fabric API; lifecycle via ARM API)

check-name.description: Check if a capacity name is available

list-skus.description: List available SKUs for a subscription

--content.description: Full JSON search body (overrides convenience flags)

--type.description: Filter by item type(s), comma-separated (e.g., Notebook,Lakehouse)

context.description: Agent introspection, offline documentation, and workspace graph extraction

agent.description: Machine-readable CLI schema for agent introspection (all commands, flags, types, mutability)
agent.notes: Returns the full command surface as JSON. Call once at session start for tool discovery.

schema.description: Show definition schema/template for a Fabric item type
schema.notes: Returns creation body template, definition parts, flags, and tips for the specified item type.

workflow.notes: Returns ordered steps with fabio commands for common multi-step tasks.

best-practices.description: Show best-practices guidance (throttling, lro, pagination, admin-apis)
best-practices.notes: Returns operational guidance tailored for agents using fabio as execution layer.

examples.description: Show example output for a command (response shape + JMESPath tips)

list.description: List all available documentation topics (schemas, workflows, examples, best-practices)

extract.description: Extract a graph of items and relationships from workspace(s)

--deep.description: Fetch item definitions to discover embedded references (slower)

--format.description: Output format: graph (default nodes/edges structure) or jsonld (RDF-compatible JSON-LD with @context and @graph)

--item-types.description: Filter to specific item types (comma-separated, case-insensitive)

--merge.description: Merge results into an existing graph file (incremental extraction)

--no-properties.description: Skip type-specific detail fetching (fast inventory-only mode)

--output-file.description: Write output to a file instead of stdout

--workspace.description: Workspace ID(s) or name(s) to scan (repeatable)

extract.notes: Output is a graph with nodes (items), edges (relationships), workspaces metadata, and a summary. Use --deep for full relationship discovery via definition scanning. Use --no-properties for fast inventory-only extraction. Use --output-file + --merge for incremental context building across sessions.

data-agent.description: Manage data agents (create, query, and interact with AI agents)

list.description: List data agents in a workspace

publish.description: Publish a data agent (promote draft config to published state, activates chat endpoint)

--to-m365.description: Also publish to Microsoft 365 Copilot Agent Store

query.description: Query (chat with) a published data agent using natural language

--show-steps.description: Include execution details (SQL queries, tool calls, run steps)

show.description: Show details of a data agent

get-config.description: Get agent configuration (instructions, preview runtime, data sources)

--instructions-file.description: Path to file with AI instructions (alternative to --instructions)

list-datasources.description: List configured data sources for a data agent

show-datasource.description: Show details of a configured data source

add-datasource.description: Add a data source to the agent (auto-discovers schema from artifact)

--artifact-type.description: Lakehouse, Warehouse, KQLDatabase, SemanticModel, Ontology, GraphModel, MirroredDatabase, SQLDatabase

remove-datasource.description: Remove a data source from the agent

select-tables.description: Select or unselect tables in a data source

list-fewshots.description: List few-shot examples for a data source

--answer.description: SQL/KQL/DAX query that answers the question (alias: --sql)

remove-fewshot.description: Remove a few-shot example by ID

upload-fewshots.description: Bulk upload few-shot examples from a JSON file

--file.description: JSON or CSV/TSV file with few-shots (JSON: [{"question":"...","query":"..."}]; CSV: question,query columns)

list-elements.description: List elements (tables, columns) in a data source with selection state and descriptions

describe-element.description: Set or clear a description on a table or column in a data source

data-build-tool-job.description: Manage data build tool jobs (dbt integration) [preview]

create.description: Create a data build tool job

delete.description: Delete a data build tool job

get-definition.description: Get data build tool job definition

run.description: Run a data build tool job

show.description: Show data build tool job details

update.description: Update data build tool job properties

update-definition.description: Update data build tool job definition

list.description: List data pipelines in a workspace

show.description: Show details of a data pipeline

list-schedules.description: List execute schedules for a data pipeline

list-instances.description: List execute job instances for a data pipeline

get-instance.description: Get a specific execute job instance

execute-query.description: Execute a query (returns Apache Arrow IPC binary)

--file.description: Output file path for Arrow IPC bytes

run.description: Run a dataflow job (execute or apply-changes)

init-params.description: Scaffold parameters.json from GUIDs in source

validate.description: Local pre-flight validation of source directory (no API calls)

deployment-pipeline.description: Manage deployment pipelines (CI/CD stages, deploy items between stages)

digital-twin-builder.description: Manage Digital Twin Builders (links to lakehouse)

digital-twin-builder-flow.description: Manage Digital Twin Builder Flows (requires parent DTB)

domain.description: Manage domains (organize workspaces into business domains)

upload-staging-library.description: Upload a library file to the staging area

eventstream.description: Manage eventstreams (real-time data ingestion and routing)

add-destination.description: Add a destination to the eventstream

add-source.description: Add a source to the eventstream

get-source-connection.description: Get source connection info (Event Hub endpoint)

send.description: Send feedback about CLI friction or feature requests

gateway.description: Manage VNet gateways and role assignments

git.description: Manage git integration (connect, commit, pull, status)

graph-model.description: Manage graph models (ontology-linked, requires portal init for refresh)

execute-query.description: Execute a KQL query against the graph

graph-query-set.description: Manage graph query sets (read-only definition export)

item.description: Manage items (18 subcommands: CRUD + copy/move + definitions + exists/url/inspect + bulk-create/bulk-delete + move-to-folder + external-data-share)

bulk-create.description: Create multiple items in parallel from JSON spec

--content.description: JSON array of items to create

copy.description: Copy an item to another workspace

create-external-data-share.description: Create an external data share for an item

--recipient-id.description: Recipient principal ID (required if --recipient-type is set)

exists.description: Check if an item exists (returns {exists: true/false}, never errors on 404)

get-definition.description: Get the definition (source code/content) of an item

--include.description: Additional metadata to include in response

--type.description: Filter by item type (e.g., Notebook, Lakehouse, Warehouse)

list-connections.description: List connections used by an item

move.description: Move an item to another workspace (copy + delete source)

move-to-folder.description: Move an item to a folder within the same workspace (or to root)

--folder-id.description: Target folder ID (omit to move to workspace root)

update-definition.description: Update (override) item definition from file or inline JSON

--definition.description: Inline JSON definition payload with parts array

--file.description: Path to definition file (base64-encoded as single part)

--update-metadata.description: Also update item metadata from .platform file

url.description: Get Fabric portal URL for an item

--type.description: Item type for accurate portal path segment

job-scheduler.description: Manage item job scheduling (run on demand, cancel, CRUD schedules)

get-instance.description: Get details of a job instance

list-instances.description: List job instances for an item

list-schedules.description: List schedules for an item job type

jobs.description: Inspect and manage async job history

get.description: Get details of a specific job

list.description: List recent jobs from local ledger

prune.description: Remove completed/failed jobs from the ledger

--include-running.description: Remove all jobs including currently running ones

query.description: Execute a KQL query against a database

run.description: Run a saved KQL query tab against its configured data source

--tab.description: Tab name or index (default: first tab)

--file.description: Path to JSON file with shortcut requests

delete-file.description: Delete a file from a lakehouse

delete-table.description: Delete a table from a lakehouse

download.description: Download a file from a lakehouse

load-table.description: Load a file into a Delta table

--format.description: Only Csv and Parquet are supported by the Fabric REST API

--schema.description: Schema name for multi-schema lakehouses (uses beta API)

--source-path.description: Relative path to source file in Files/

move-file.description: Move files (atomic rename for same-item, copy+delete for cross-item; glob patterns, parallel)

move-table.description: Move a table (atomic directory rename for same-item, copy+delete for cross-item)

optimize-table.description: Optimize a Delta table (V-Order compaction + optional Z-Order clustering)

query.description: Execute T-SQL query via the lakehouse SQL analytics endpoint

--sql.description: SQL query (prefix @ to read from file, omit for stdin)

show.description: Show lakehouse details (includes SQL endpoint properties)

sync.description: Sync files between lakehouses or from local directory (--local). Server-side dedup, rename detection, rsync-inspired flags. Copies new/modified files, detects renames (--delete), deduplicates from existing dest content (--checksum). Output: copied/dedupCopied/renamed/deleted/unchanged/failed counts.

--checksum.description: Use Content-MD5 comparison (HEAD per file). Enables content-based dedup and rename detection.

--delete.description: Delete files at destination not present in source

--exclude.description: Exclude files matching glob patterns (semicolon-separated, e.g. '*.tmp;_delta_log/*')

--existing.description: Only update files already present at destination (skip new files)

--force.description: Copy all files regardless of comparison (mirror mode)

--include.description: Include only files matching glob patterns (semicolon-separated, e.g. '*.csv;*.parquet')

--local.description: Local directory to sync from (alternative to --source-workspace/--source-id/--source-path). Uploads only new/changed files.

--max-delete.description: Safety limit: skip ALL deletions if count exceeds this number

--max-size.description: Skip files larger than SIZE (supports K, M, G suffixes)

--min-size.description: Skip files smaller than SIZE (supports K, M, G suffixes)

--no-overwrite.description: Only copy files not present at destination (skip existing)

--remove-source-files.description: Delete source files after successful transfer (move semantics)

--size-only.description: Compare only by file size (skip ETag/checksum comparison)

table-schema.description: Show Delta table schema (reads from OneLake _delta_log without Spark/SQL)

iceberg-config.description: Get Iceberg REST Catalog configuration (available endpoints and warehouse prefix)

iceberg-namespaces.description: List table namespaces (schemas) via the Iceberg REST Catalog

iceberg-namespace.description: Get metadata for a specific namespace via the Iceberg REST Catalog

iceberg-tables.description: List tables in a namespace via the Iceberg REST Catalog

iceberg-table.description: Get full table definition (schema, partitions, snapshots, properties) via Iceberg REST Catalog

iceberg-table-exists.description: Check if a table exists via Iceberg REST Catalog (lightweight HEAD, returns {exists: bool})

iceberg-namespace-exists.description: Check if a namespace exists via Iceberg REST Catalog (lightweight HEAD, returns {exists: bool})

iceberg-credentials.description: Load vended storage credentials scoped to a specific table (for external tools like DuckDB, Polars)

iceberg-stats.description: Show table statistics from latest Iceberg snapshot (records, files, size, compression, source format)

iceberg-snapshots.description: Show full snapshot history with operations and record counts

upload.description: Upload a file to a lakehouse
upload.hint: For incremental sync (only upload new/changed files), use: fabio lakehouse sync --local <dir> --dest-workspace <ws> --dest-id <id> --dest-path <path>. Supports --checksum, --include/--exclude, --delete, and other rsync-inspired flags.

vacuum-table.description: Vacuum a Delta table (remove old files beyond retention period)

map.description: Manage maps (geospatial visualization with Azure Maps)

mirrored-catalog.description: Manage mirrored catalogs (requires tenant feature flag)

mirrored-warehouse.description: Manage mirrored warehouses (requires tenant feature flag)

mounted-data-factory.description: Manage mounted data factories (link to Azure Data Factory)

create.description: Create (requires ADF ARM resource ID in definition)

get-definition.description: Get the definition (source code) of a notebook

--parameters.description: JSON array of {name, value, type} objects

status.description: Check the status of a notebook run

onelake-security.description: Manage OneLake data access roles (row/column-level security)

list.description: List data access roles for an item

upsert.description: Create or replace all data access roles

ontology.description: Manage ontologies (entity types, relationships, data bindings)

operation.description: Inspect long-running operation state and results

operations-agent.description: Manage operations agents (goals, instructions, data sources, actions)

paginated-report.description: Manage paginated reports (read-only creation via portal/SSRS)

save.description: Save a named profile with default settings

--private-link-workspace.description: Workspace ID for private link URL routing

reflex.description: Manage Reflex items (Data Activator triggers and alerts)

create.description: Create a report from definition file

rest.description: Raw REST API passthrough (supports Fabric and Power BI APIs)

call.description: Execute a raw REST API call

--body.description: Request body (inline JSON, @file, or @- for stdin)

--poll.description: Poll LRO until completion (Fabric API only)

--query-params.description: URL query parameters as key=value pairs

nl-to-kql.description: Translate natural language to KQL query

--chat-messages.description: JSON array of {role, content} for multi-turn context

--item-id.description: KQL Database or Eventhouse ID for billing

add-user.description: Grant a user access to a semantic model

bind-connection.description: Bind a semantic model to a connection (lakehouse SQL endpoint ID)

clone.description: Clone a semantic model to the same or different workspace

create.description: Create a semantic model from definition file (model.bim or TMDL)

delete-user.description: Revoke a user's access to a semantic model

export-pbix.description: Export a semantic model as a .pbix file

import-pbix.description: Import a .pbix file as a new semantic model

list-datasources.description: List data sources bound to a semantic model

list-parameters.description: List parameters of a semantic model

list-upstream.description: List upstream datasets this model depends on

list-users.description: List users with access to a semantic model

query.description: Execute DAX query against a semantic model

refresh.description: Trigger a refresh on a semantic model

takeover.description: Take ownership of a definition-managed semantic model (makes it editable in portal)

unbind-connection.description: Unbind a semantic model from its current connection

update-definition.description: Update semantic model definition from file

spark.description: Manage Spark compute (workspace settings, custom pools)

spark-job-definition.description: Manage Spark job definitions (batch Spark jobs)

import.description: Import CSV/JSON into a table (creates table with type inference)

sql-endpoint.description: Manage SQL endpoints (read-only companion to lakehouses)

query.description: Execute T-SQL query against SQL endpoint
examples: fabio sql-endpoint query --workspace $WS --id $ID --sql "SELECT TOP 10 * FROM dbo.my_table"

upgrade.description: Upgrade fabio to the latest release from GitHub

--check.description: Only check if an update is available (do not install)

--force.description: Force reinstall even if already on the latest version

--dry-run.description: Show what would be done without executing

warehouse.description: Manage warehouses and run SQL queries

connection-string.description: Get TDS connection string for a warehouse

--guest-tenant-id.description: Guest tenant AAD object ID (for cross-tenant access)

query.description: Execute a SQL query against a warehouse

--sql.description: SQL query (prefix @ to read from file, omit for stdin)

set-firewall-rules.description: Set IP firewall rules (replaces all, max 256)

url.description: Get Fabric portal URL for a workspace
